testCases.title: /start with no tracked codes → welcome message only
testCases.preconditions: User has zero tracked codes (fresh state or deleted all).
steps: Ensure no codes are tracked (run /delete on all if needed)
testCases.expectedResult: Bot replies with a welcome message. No inline keyboard buttons shown.

testCases.title: /start with existing codes → inline keyboard shown
testCases.preconditions: User has at least 2 tracked codes registered.
steps: Add 2 tracking codes by sending them as plain text
testCases.expectedResult: Bot replies with welcome message AND inline keyboard buttons — one per tracked code.

testCases.title: Tapping /start inline button triggers re-check
testCases.preconditions: User has at least 1 tracked code and /start inline buttons are visible.
steps: Tap one of the inline keyboard buttons
testCases.expectedResult: Bot re-checks that code and sends back the current status. Rate limit still applies if within 5 minutes.

testCases.title: /list with no tracked codes → empty state message
testCases.expectedResult: Bot replies with a message indicating no tracked codes. Does NOT crash or show empty list silently.

testCases.title: /list shows all tracked codes and last status
testCases.preconditions: User has at least 2 tracked codes with known statuses.
testCases.expectedResult: Bot replies with all tracked codes and their last known status. List matches exactly what was added.

testCases.title: /delete with no tracked codes → empty state message
testCases.expectedResult: Bot replies saying there are no codes to delete. No inline buttons shown. Does NOT crash.

testCases.title: /delete inline button removes the selected code
testCases.preconditions: User has at least 2 tracked codes.
steps: Tap the button for the first tracking code
testCases.expectedResult: Selected code is removed and confirmation shown. /list afterwards confirms the code is gone. Other codes remain.

testCases.title: /delete <CODE> removes a specific code directly
testCases.preconditions: User has a tracked code e.g. CEX123456789.
testCases.expectedResult: Bot confirms the code was removed. /list confirms code is gone. No inline buttons shown.

testCases.title: /delete <CODE> for a code not being tracked → error
testCases.expectedResult: Bot replies with not found or error message. No crash, no silent failure.

testCases.title: /help shows all available commands with descriptions
testCases.expectedResult: Bot replies with all commands: /start, /list, /delete, /help — each with a brief description. No commands missing from the PRD table.
testCases.notes: Cross-check against PRD section 7 command table.
